title: agathis robusta subsp. robusta
intro: Agathis robusta subsp. robusta, also known as the Daintree rainforest kauri or Daintree kauri, is a subspecies of tree native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Agathis robusta subsp. robusta include its ability to protect against infections, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into a paste or oil, which can be applied topically to the affected area to utilize its medicinal properties.
